query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'send_ready_contact' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_contact,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'discovery_queued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS discovery_queued,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'no_contacts' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts,
  COUNT(*) AS total_hot
FROM projects
WHERE priority = 'hot' AND suppressed = 0 AND lifecycleStatus = 'active';

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'send_ready_contact' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS send_ready_contact,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS named_no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'discovery_queued' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS discovery_queued,
  SUM(CASE WHEN discoveryStatus = 'no_contacts' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_contacts,
  COUNT(*) AS total_hot
FROM projects
WHERE priority = 'hot' AND suppressed = 0 AND lifecycleStatus = 'active';
